User.title: User
User.description: A user of the application, either a student or a teacher.

id.description: The unique ID of the user.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

Essay.title: Essay
Essay.description: An essay written by a student.

id.description: The unique ID of the essay.

userId.description: The ID of the student who wrote the essay.

userName.description: The name of the student who wrote the essay.

marks.description: The marks awarded by the teacher (0-30).

feedback.description: The feedback provided by the teacher.

status.description: The current status of the essay.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the essay was created.

/essays/{essayId}.description: A collection of all essays written by students.
